_doc: Config-driven instrument universes for the event engine. Each catalogue event names the universe(s) it needs. scripts/fetch_history.js fetches the union of tickers referenced by the active catalogue plus any universe listed here. Add instruments as events require them — start focused, grow deliberately.

core._doc: Initial focused cross-asset set. Liquid ETFs, all daily-available via Yahoo v8. The bootstrap universe; grow as events require.

planned._doc: Not yet wired — added when an event needs them.
planned.japan_sectors: TOPIX-17 Tokyo-listed sector ETFs 1617.T..1633.T (Japan internal-breadth; scope in private/)
planned.futures: DATA-GATED — continuous futures require a Norgate feed; Yahoo unreliable. Do not fake.
